title: stelis meridana
intro: Stelis meridana, also known as the Coralroot, is a perennial orchid plant native to North America. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its high content of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis meridana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, fever, and sore throats, as well as its role in promoting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an herbal tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although modern preparations often involve the extraction of its iridoid glycosides in a concentrated form.
